scenarios.description: setTrackPosition(true) sets trackPosition to true and returns the same Parser instance (branch-true)
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); // real TreeBuilder with default settings
scenarios.expectedResult: parser.isTrackPosition() == true AND returned value == parser
pseudocode: TEST TC01 setTrackPosition true enables position tracking
assert parser.isTrackPosition() == true; assert returned == parser;

scenarios.description: setTrackPosition(false) sets trackPosition to false and returns the same Parser instance (branch-false)
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); parser.setTrackPosition(true); // ensure toggled from true to false
scenarios.expectedResult: parser.isTrackPosition() == false AND returned value == parser
pseudocode: TEST TC02 setTrackPosition false disables position tracking
Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); parser.setTrackPosition(true);
assert parser.isTrackPosition() == false; assert returned == parser;
